nasb.text: So Asa went out to meet him, and they drew up in battle formation in the valley of Zephathah at Mareshah.

esv.text: And Asa went out to meet him, and they drew up their lines of battle in the Valley of Zephathah at Mareshah.

cnv.text: 於是亞撒出去迎戰；他們就在瑪利沙的洗法谷列陣相對。

ccb.text: 亚撒出兵迎敌，双方在玛利沙的洗法谷摆开阵势。
